meaning: n.安加拉河(位于西伯利亚中南部)
examples: In addition, the Angara flora represents a temperate climatic condition.
What's odd, like the Angara 5's maiden flight, is it's a night time launch.
It was formed in the 1960s with a huge dam across the Angara River to provide hydroelectric power.
Ramos's Lakas-NUCD party has more cabinet posts (five) than Estrada's own LaMMP coalition with his defeated running-mate Senator Edgardo Angara (four).
Angara was his running mate, whose party joined forces with Estrada's.
